```{r Import libraries}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
# Commented during development - using local installation
# pak::pak("Brar/neoipcr@PartnerReport")
# Uncommented during development - using local installation
devtools::load_all("../../../neoipcr", recompile = TRUE)
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(yaml, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(smplot2, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(neoipcr, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up functions}
#| include: false

source("../common/helpers.R")

# Outlier detection configuration - groups of related metrics
outlier_groupings <- list(
  incidence_density_rate_table = list(
    severe_infection = list(
      metrics = c("si", "bsi", "hap"),
      template_prefix = "grouped_severe_infection",
      mode = "all_or_ungrouped"
    )
  ),
  usage_density_rate_table = list(
    vascular_catheter_rates = list(
      metrics = c("cvc", "pvc"),
      signature_order = c("pvc", "cvc"),
      template_prefix = "grouped_vascular_catheter_rates",
      mode = "signature",
      impossible_signatures = character(0)
    ),
    ventilatory_support_rates = list(
      metrics = c("vs", "niv", "inv"),
      signature_order = c("vs", "niv", "inv"),
      template_prefix = "grouped_ventilatory_support_rates",
      mode = "signature",
      impossible_signatures = character(0)
    ),
    protective_factors = list(
      metrics = c("human_milk", "kangaroo_care", "probiotic"),
      template_prefix = "grouped_protective_factors",
      mode = "all_or_ungrouped"
    ),
    antibiotic_rates = list(
      metrics = c("ab", "a", "w", "r"),
      template_prefix = "grouped_antibiotic_rates",
      mode = "all_or_ungrouped"
    )
  )
)

# Detect outliers by comparing department values to reference quartiles
detect_outliers <- function(table_data, identifier_col = NULL, combine_cols = NULL) {
  if (is.null(table_data) || nrow(table_data) == 0) {
    return(list(
      below_q1 = character(0),
      above_q3 = character(0),
      state_map = c()
    ))
  }

  # detect own rate column
  col_names <- names(table_data)
  own_col_name_candidates <- c("pooled_own", "rate_own")
  own_col_name <- own_col_name_candidates[own_col_name_candidates %in% col_names]
  
  # Check for required columns
  if (!(length(own_col_name) == 1 && all(c("q1_ref", "q3_ref") %in% col_names))) {
    return(list(
      below_q1 = character(0),
      above_q3 = character(0),
      state_map = c()
    ))
  }
  
  # Get row identifiers
  if (!is.null(combine_cols) && all(combine_cols %in% names(table_data))) {
    # Combine multiple columns (e.g., "3gcr: Enterobacteriaceae")
    identifiers <- apply(table_data[, combine_cols, drop = FALSE], 1, function(row) {
      paste(row, collapse = ":")
    })
  } else if (!is.null(identifier_col) && identifier_col %in% names(table_data)) {
    # Use specified column
    identifiers <- as.character(table_data[[identifier_col]])
  } else if (!is.null(rownames(table_data)) && !all(rownames(table_data) == as.character(1:nrow(table_data)))) {
    # Use row names if available
    identifiers <- rownames(table_data)
  } else if (ncol(table_data) > 0) {
    # Fall back to first column
    identifiers <- as.character(table_data[[1]])
  } else {
    identifiers <- as.character(1:nrow(table_data))
  }

  own_values <- table_data[[own_col_name]]
  has_ref_quartiles <- !is.na(table_data$q1_ref) & !is.na(table_data$q3_ref)
  has_own_rate <- !is.na(own_values)
  comparable <- has_ref_quartiles & has_own_rate

  states <- rep("no_quartile_ref", length(identifiers))
  states[comparable] <- "within_q1_q3"
  states[comparable & own_values < table_data$q1_ref] <- "below_q1"
  states[comparable & own_values > table_data$q3_ref] <- "above_q3"

  below_q1 <- identifiers[states == "below_q1"]
  above_q3 <- identifiers[states == "above_q3"]

  state_map <- stats::setNames(states, tolower(identifiers))

  list(
    below_q1 = below_q1,
    above_q3 = above_q3,
    state_map = state_map
  )
}

# Group related outliers based on predefined groupings
group_outliers <- function(outliers, table_name = NULL) {
  if (length(outliers$below_q1) == 0 && length(outliers$above_q3) == 0) {
    return(list())
  }
  
  grouped <- list(
    grouped_templates = list(),
    ungrouped = list(
      below_q1 = outliers$below_q1,
      above_q3 = outliers$above_q3
    ),
    state_map = outliers$state_map
  )

  remove_case_insensitive <- function(values, values_to_remove) {
    values[!(tolower(values) %in% tolower(values_to_remove))]
  }

  visible_states <- c("below_q1", "above_q3")

  # Try to match and group outliers
  table_groupings <- outlier_groupings[[table_name]]
  if (!is.null(table_groupings)) {
    for (group_name in names(table_groupings)) {
      group_config <- table_groupings[[group_name]]

      group_metrics <- tolower(group_config$metrics)
      state_map <- grouped$state_map
      available_metrics <- group_metrics[group_metrics %in% names(state_map)]

      if (length(available_metrics) == 0) {
        next
      }

      visible_metrics <- available_metrics[state_map[available_metrics] %in% visible_states]

      if (length(visible_metrics) == 0) {
        next
      }

      metric_suffixes <- dplyr::if_else(
        state_map[visible_metrics] == "below_q1",
        "low",
        "high"
      )
      names(metric_suffixes) <- visible_metrics

      group_mode <- if (is.null(group_config$mode)) "all_or_ungrouped" else group_config$mode
      template_key <- NULL

      if (group_mode == "all_or_ungrouped") {
        all_group_metrics_visible <- length(visible_metrics) == length(group_metrics)
        all_same_direction <- length(unique(metric_suffixes)) == 1

        if (all_group_metrics_visible && all_same_direction) {
          template_key <- paste0(group_config$template_prefix, "_", metric_suffixes[1])
        }
      } else if (group_mode == "signature") {
        all_group_metrics_visible <- length(visible_metrics) == length(group_metrics)
        all_same_direction <- length(unique(metric_suffixes)) == 1

        if (length(visible_metrics) == 1) {
          template_key <- paste0(
            group_config$template_prefix,
            "_",
            visible_metrics[1],
            "_",
            metric_suffixes[1]
          )
        } else if (all_group_metrics_visible && all_same_direction) {
          template_key <- paste0(group_config$template_prefix, "_", metric_suffixes[1])
        } else {
          signature_order <- if (is.null(group_config$signature_order)) group_metrics else group_config$signature_order
          ordered_visible <- signature_order[signature_order %in% visible_metrics]
          signature <- paste(
            purrr::map_chr(
              ordered_visible,
              \(metric) paste0(metric, "_", metric_suffixes[[metric]])
            ),
            collapse = "_"
          )

          impossible_signatures <- if (is.null(group_config$impossible_signatures)) character(0) else group_config$impossible_signatures
          if (!(signature %in% impossible_signatures)) {
            template_key <- paste0(group_config$template_prefix, "_", signature)
          }
        }
      }

      if (!is.null(template_key)) {
        grouped$grouped_templates[[group_name]] <- template_key
        grouped$ungrouped$below_q1 <- remove_case_insensitive(grouped$ungrouped$below_q1, visible_metrics)
        grouped$ungrouped$above_q3 <- remove_case_insensitive(grouped$ungrouped$above_q3, visible_metrics)
      }
    }
  }

  return(grouped)
}

# Localize metric name by looking up in string resources
localize_metric_name <- function(metric_id, sR) {
  # Check for combined identifiers (e.g., "3gcr:Enterobacteriaceae")
  if (grepl(":", metric_id)) {
    parts <- strsplit(metric_id, ":", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    if (length(parts) == 2) {
      abr_key <- parts[1]
      pathogen_name <- parts[2]
      # Localize the resistance mechanism
      localized_abr <- if (!is.null(sR[[abr_key]])) sR[[abr_key]] else abr_key
      return(paste(localized_abr, pathogen_name, sep = ": "))
    }
  }
  
  # Try top-level keys first (infections: bsi, hap, nec, si, ssi)
  if (!is.null(sR[[metric_id]])) {
    return(sR[[metric_id]])
  }
  
  # Try tbl-risk-density-rates (devices and protective factors: CVC, PVC, INV, human_milk, etc.)
  if (!is.null(sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`[[tolower(metric_id)]])) {
    return(sR$`tbl-risk-density-rates`[[tolower(metric_id)]])
  }
  
  # Try tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates
  if (!is.null(sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`[[tolower(metric_id)]])) {
    return(sR$`tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates`[[tolower(metric_id)]])
  }
  
  # Fall back to the raw identifier if no localization found
  return(metric_id)
}

# Format outlier text for display in callout boxes
format_outlier_text <- function(outlier_groups, sR) {
  if (is.null(outlier_groups) || length(outlier_groups) == 0) {
    return("")
  }
  
  text_parts <- character(0)

  # Process grouped outliers
  if (length(outlier_groups$grouped_templates) > 0) {
    for (group_name in names(outlier_groups$grouped_templates)) {
      template_key <- outlier_groups$grouped_templates[[group_name]]
      if (!is.null(sR$outlier[[template_key]])) {
        text_parts <- c(text_parts, sR$outlier[[template_key]])
      }
    }
  }

  # Process ungrouped outliers below Q1
  if (length(outlier_groups$ungrouped$below_q1) > 0) {
    localized_metrics <- sapply(outlier_groups$ungrouped$below_q1, localize_metric_name, sR = sR)
    metrics_list <- paste(paste("*", localized_metrics), collapse = "\n")
    if (!is.null(sR$outlier$below_q1_group)) {
      # Split template at METRIC_LIST placeholder and rebuild with proper newlines
      template_parts <- strsplit(sR$outlier$below_q1_group, "METRIC_LIST", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
      if (length(template_parts) == 2) {
        text <- paste0(
          trimws(template_parts[1]),
          "\n\n",
          metrics_list,
          "\n\n",
          trimws(template_parts[2])
        )
      } else {
        text <- sR$outlier$below_q1_group
      }
      text_parts <- c(text_parts, text)
    }
  }

  # Process ungrouped outliers above Q3
  if (length(outlier_groups$ungrouped$above_q3) > 0) {
    localized_metrics <- sapply(outlier_groups$ungrouped$above_q3, localize_metric_name, sR = sR)
    metrics_list <- paste(paste("*", localized_metrics), collapse = "\n")
    if (!is.null(sR$outlier$above_q3_group)) {
      # Split template at METRIC_LIST placeholder and rebuild with proper newlines
      template_parts <- strsplit(sR$outlier$above_q3_group, "METRIC_LIST", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
      if (length(template_parts) == 2) {
        text <- paste0(
          trimws(template_parts[1]),
          "\n\n",
          metrics_list,
          "\n\n",
          trimws(template_parts[2])
        )
      } else {
        text <- sR$outlier$above_q3_group
      }
      text_parts <- c(text_parts, text)
    }
  }

  # Combine all text parts
  if (length(text_parts) > 0) {
    paste(text_parts, collapse = "\n\n")
  } else {
    ""
  }
}

# Interpret distribution comparison for figures
interpret_distribution <- function(figure_data, metric_type, sR) {
  if (is.null(figure_data)) {
    return("")
  }

  location_params <- figure_data$location_parameters
  if (is.null(location_params) ||
      nrow(location_params) < 2 ||
      !"ref" %in% location_params$dataset) {
    return("")
  }

  own_data <- location_params[location_params$dataset == "own", ]
  ref_data <- location_params[location_params$dataset == "ref", ]
  
  if (nrow(own_data) == 0 || nrow(ref_data) == 0) {
    return("")
  }

  text_parts <- character(0)

  # Compare medians (using q2 which is median)
  own_median <- own_data$q2
  ref_median <- ref_data$q2

  # Calculate difference as percentage of reference median
  median_diff_pct <- ((own_median - ref_median) / ref_median) * 100

  # Determine median comparison (using 5% threshold for "similar")
  if (abs(median_diff_pct) < 5) {
    template_key <- paste0(metric_type, "_similar_median")
  } else if (own_median < ref_median) {
    template_key <- paste0(metric_type, "_lower_median")
  } else {
    template_key <- paste0(metric_type, "_higher_median")
  }

  if (!is.null(sR$figure_interpretation[[template_key]])) {
    text_parts <- c(text_parts, sR$figure_interpretation[[template_key]])
  }

  # Compare distribution spread (IQR)
  own_iqr <- own_data$q3 - own_data$q1
  ref_iqr <- ref_data$q3 - ref_data$q1
  iqr_diff_pct <- ((own_iqr - ref_iqr) / ref_iqr) * 100

  # Note distribution width difference if substantial (>20% difference)
  if (abs(iqr_diff_pct) > 20) {
    if (own_iqr < ref_iqr) {
      if (!is.null(sR$figure_interpretation$narrower_distribution)) {
        text_parts <- c(text_parts, sR$figure_interpretation$narrower_distribution)
      }
    } else {
      if (!is.null(sR$figure_interpretation$wider_distribution)) {
        text_parts <- c(text_parts, sR$figure_interpretation$wider_distribution)
      }
    }
  }

  # Combine all text parts
  if (length(text_parts) > 0) {
    paste(text_parts, collapse = " ")
  } else {
    ""
  }
}

#' Detect if own and reference data have different World Bank classes (Partner Report)
#' @param own_countries Tibble with own countries (name, wb_class)
#' @param ref_countries Tibble with reference countries (name, wb_class)
#' @param include_wb_class Whether WB class is included ("no", "pseudonymised", "yes")
#' @return List with has_mismatch (logical) and details (character) or NULL
detect_wb_class_mismatch <- function(own_countries, ref_countries, include_wb_class) {
  # Only detect mismatches when include_wb_class = "yes"
  if (include_wb_class != "yes" ||
      is.null(own_countries) ||
      is.null(ref_countries)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # For character vectors, no WB class info available
  if (is.character(own_countries) || is.character(ref_countries) ||
      !("wb_class" %in% names(own_countries)) ||
      !("wb_class" %in% names(ref_countries))) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Get unique WB classes
  own_classes <- own_countries |>
    dplyr::pull("wb_class") |>
    as.character() |>
    unique() |>
    sort()

  ref_classes <- ref_countries |>
    dplyr::pull("wb_class") |>
    as.character() |>
    unique() |>
    sort()

  # Check if they differ
  has_mismatch <- !setequal(own_classes, ref_classes)

  if (!has_mismatch) {
    return(list(has_mismatch = FALSE))
  }

  # Get localized display names for the classes
  own_class_names <- get_localised_world_bank_class_names(own_classes) |>
    paste(collapse = ", ")

  ref_class_names <- get_localised_world_bank_class_names(ref_classes) |>
    paste(collapse = ", ")

  return(list(
    has_mismatch = TRUE,
    own_classes = own_class_names,
    ref_classes = ref_class_names
  ))
}

```

```{r Initialise locale dependent information}
#| include: false

locale <- Sys.getenv("LC_ALL")
localeObj <- parse_locales(locale)[[1]]
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
invisible(Sys.setLanguage(localeObj$language))
if(is.null(localeObj$territory)){
  locale_gt <- localeObj$language
  locale_stringi <- localeObj$language
} else {
  locale_gt <- paste0(localeObj$language, "-", localeObj$territory)
  locale_stringi <- paste0(localeObj$language, "_", localeObj$territory)
}
options(`gt.locale` = locale_gt)

sR <- get_string_resources(localeObj)
```

```{r General setup and parameter preparation}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()

if (!is.null(params$ReferenceDataFile)) {
  if (!file.exists(params$ReferenceDataFile))
    stop(sprintf("The file '%s' does not exist.", params$ReferenceDataFile))
  reference_data <- jsonlite::unserializeJSON(
    readChar(
        params$ReferenceDataFile,
        file.info(params$ReferenceDataFile)$size))
} else {
  reference_data <- NULL
}

typedParams <- list(
  ReferenceDataFile = params$ReferenceDataFile,
  UnitCodes = params$UnitCodes,
  ReportingPeriodFrom = if (!is.null(params$ReportingPeriodFrom)) as.Date(params$ReportingPeriodFrom) else NULL,
  ReportingPeriodTo = if (!is.null(params$ReportingPeriodTo)) as.Date(params$ReportingPeriodTo) else NULL,
  BirthWeightFrom = if (!is.null(params$BirthWeightFrom)) as.integer(params$BirthWeightFrom) else NULL,
  BirthWeightTo = if (!is.null(params$BirthWeightTo)) as.integer(params$BirthWeightTo) else NULL,
  GestationWeeksFrom = if (!is.null(params$GestationWeeksFrom)) as.integer(params$GestationWeeksFrom) else NULL,
  GestationWeeksTo = if (!is.null(params$GestationWeeksTo)) as.integer(params$GestationWeeksTo) else NULL,
  IncludeNonCorePatients = if (!is.null(params$IncludeNonCorePatients)) as.logical(params$GestationWeeksTo) else FALSE
)

get_unit_data <- function() suppressWarnings(
  import_dhis2(
    dataset_options = dhis2_dataset_options(
      department_filter = typedParams$UnitCodes,
      surveillance_end_from = typedParams$ReportingPeriodFrom,
      surveillance_end_to = typedParams$ReportingPeriodTo,
      birth_weight_from = typedParams$BirthWeightFrom,
      birth_weight_to = typedParams$BirthWeightTo,
      gestational_age_from = typedParams$GestationWeeksFrom,
      gestational_age_to = typedParams$GestationWeeksTo,
      include_ineligible_patients = typedParams$IncludeNonCorePatients,
      include_world_bank_class = "yes",
      include_country = "yes",
      include_department = "yes"
      ))) |>
  neoipcr::calculate_department_data()

benchmark_data <- if (is.null(reference_data)) {
  neoipcr::get_benchmark_data(
    own = get_unit_data())
} else {
  neoipcr::get_benchmark_data(
    own = get_unit_data(),
    ref = reference_data)
}

```

```{r Preparing localised data}
#| include: false

# Format department metadata
dR <- list(
  own = list(
  creationTimestamp = format(
    lubridate::now("UTC"),
    format = "%x %X",
    tz = "UTC",
    usetz = TRUE),
  dataUpToTimestamp = if (!is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$data_up_to)) {
    format(
      benchmark_data$metadata$own$data_up_to,
      format = "%x %X",
      tz = "UTC",
      usetz = TRUE)
  } else {
    format(
      lubridate::now("UTC"),
      format = "%x %X",
      tz = "UTC",
      usetz = TRUE)
  },
  effectiveAnalysisPeriod = if (!is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$effective_analysis_period)) {
    paste(
      format(benchmark_data$metadata$own$effective_analysis_period$from, format = "%x"),
      format(benchmark_data$metadata$own$effective_analysis_period$to, format = "%x"),
      sep = " - "
    )
  } else {
    "Not available"
  },
  countriesList = {
    countries_data <- benchmark_data$metadata$own$countries

    if (!is.data.frame(countries_data)) {
      countries_data <- tibble::tibble(name = countries_data)
    }

    # Format with or without WB class
    format_countries(countries_data)
  },
  birthweightFilter = if(
    is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_from) &&
    is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
      sR$headerList$allBirthweights
    } else if(
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_from)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≤ ",
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    } else if(
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≥ ",
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    } else {
      paste0(
        c(
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
          " g - ",
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    },
  gestationalAgeFilter = if(
    is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_from) &&
    is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
      sR$headerList$allGestationalAges
    } else if(
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_from)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≤ ",
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    } else if(
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≥ ",
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    } else {
      paste0(
        c(
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
          " w - ",
          format_integer(
            benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    },
  numberOfDepartments = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_departments$n_own),
  numberOfPatients = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_patients$total_own),
  numberOfAdmissions = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_enrollments$total_own),
  sumOfPatientDays = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_patient_days$total_own),
  averageSurveillancePeriod = format(
    benchmark_data$n_patient_days$total_own / benchmark_data$n_patients$total_own,
    digits = 2,
    nsmall = 1,
    scientific = FALSE)
  ),
  ref = if ("ref" %in% benchmark_data$dataset_names) {
  list(
    creationTimestamp = format(
      benchmark_data$metadata$ref$calculated,
      format = "%x %X",
      tz = "UTC",
      usetz = TRUE),
    dataUpToTimestamp = format(
      benchmark_data$metadata$ref$data_up_to,
      format = "%x %X",
      tz = "UTC",
      usetz = TRUE),
    effectiveAnalysisPeriod = if (!is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$effective_analysis_period)) {
      paste(
        format(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$effective_analysis_period$from, format = "%x"),
        format(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$effective_analysis_period$to, format = "%x"),
        sep = " - "
      )
    } else {
      "Not available"
    },
    countriesList = {
      countries_data <- benchmark_data$metadata$ref$countries

      if (!is.data.frame(countries_data)) {
        countries_data <- tibble::tibble(name = countries_data)
      }

      # Format with or without WB class
      format_countries(countries_data)
    },
    birthweightFilter = if(
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_from) &&
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
        sR$headerList$allBirthweights
      } else if(
        is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_from)) {
        paste0(
          c(
            "≤ ",
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
            " g"),
          collapse = "")
      } else if(
        is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
        paste0(
          c(
            "≥ ",
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
            " g"),
          collapse = "")
      } else {
        paste0(
          c(
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
            " g - ",
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
            " g"),
          collapse = "")
      },
    gestationalAgeFilter = if(
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_from) &&
      is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
        sR$headerList$allGestationalAges
      } else if(
        is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_from)) {
        paste0(
          c(
            "≤ ",
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
            " w"),
          collapse = "")
      } else if(
        is.null(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
        paste0(
          c(
            "≥ ",
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
            " w"),
          collapse = "")
      } else {
        paste0(
          c(
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
            " w - ",
            format_integer(
              benchmark_data$metadata$ref$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
            " w"),
          collapse = "")
      },
    numberOfDepartments = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_departments$n_ref),
    numberOfPatients = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_patients$total_ref),
    numberOfAdmissions = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_enrollments$total_ref),
    sumOfPatientDays = format_integer(benchmark_data$n_patient_days$total_ref),
    averageSurveillancePeriod = format(
      benchmark_data$n_patient_days$total_own / benchmark_data$n_patients$total_own,
      digits = 2,
      nsmall = 1,
      scientific = FALSE)
  )
  } else {
    NULL
  }
)

# Detect metadata differences for highlighting
metadata_diff <- if (!is.null(dR$ref)) {
  list(
    birthweight_differs = (dR$own$birthweightFilter != dR$ref$birthweightFilter),
    gestational_age_differs = (dR$own$gestationalAgeFilter != dR$ref$gestationalAgeFilter),
    countries_differ = (dR$own$countriesList != dR$ref$countriesList)
  )
} else {
  list(
    birthweight_differs = FALSE,
    gestational_age_differs = FALSE,
    countries_differ = FALSE
  )
}

# Detect World Bank class mismatches
wb_class_mismatch <- if (!is.null(dR$ref)) {
  detect_wb_class_mismatch(
    own_countries = benchmark_data$metadata$own$countries,
    ref_countries = benchmark_data$metadata$ref$countries,
    include_wb_class = benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$include_world_bank_class
  )
} else {
  NULL
}

```

```{r Set up NeoIPC layout}
#| include: false

NeoIPC_pallette <- c("#FF9015","#0083C1","#0D4F6C","#E6FAFC","#E0D3DE","#1F271B")
pal <- c(NeoIPC_pallette[5],NeoIPC_pallette[2],NeoIPC_pallette[6])

```
